title: Nginx IP Allow Deny Example
summary: Restrict a Nginx location by client IP ranges.
verification_setup: Install Nginx on a staging host.
Replace the sample IP ranges with the exact networks you control before validation.
If Nginx is behind a trusted proxy, configure real-IP handling before validation.
verification_command: Manual verification only; see README.md for the staging checklist.
verification_notes: Not executed. The example follows the official Nginx access module syntax, but it still requires nginx -t and staging requests from both allowed and denied source addresses before use.
